mdx:
with member [Measures].[Sales Pct] as '[Measures].[Store Sales] / [Measures].[Store Cost]', format_string = '#.00%'
select {[Measures].[Sales Pct]} on columns,
  {[Product].[Product Family].members} on rows
from Sales
where ([Time].[1997])

sqlExecutions.sql: select "product_class"."product_family" as "c0" from "product" as "product", "product_class" as "product_class" where "product"."product_class_id" = "product_class"."product_class_id" group by "product_class"."product_family" order by CASE WHEN "product_class"."product_family" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, "product_class"."product_family" ASC
